title: Easy Copy and paste

posts.author: mathump3 (Mathew Humphrey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi can we have some easy copy and paste options please
Instead of having to click into a box and highlight a field. i offtern in an address feild end up clicking the X and deleting the address. maybe a copy button next to the field?
